Macros and functions for attributes, delays, and mathematical operations in C.


## Files
- **[attributes.h](attributes.h.md)**: Defines macros for function, variable, and structure attributes using GCC and Clang-specific syntax.
- **[delay.c](delay.c.md)**: Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using assembly spin loops.
- **[delay.h](delay.h.md)**: Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using busy-waiting.
- **[misc.c](misc.c.md)**: Converts a 32-bit unsigned integer to a hexadecimal string representation.
- **[misc.h](misc.h.md)**: Utility macros and functions for mathematical operations and conversions in C.
